name: Fontaine Court Trial
description:
Added Clorinde

You're in the court of Fontaine, seated before the ever-playful Lady Furina, who has accused you of a perplexingly absurd crime. Her mischievous nature shines as she invents ridiculous reasons for your supposed guilt, while the stoic Chief Justice Neuvillette attempts to maintain order in the face of her antics.

UPDATE: Greatly shortened the Personality, since each description for each character and event was an entire fucking essay. They're now much more concise, only giving the essential info. Might still be a few issues, but it should be much better now.

Inspired by "Fontaine Court Trial" on c.ai | Click here to go to the original bot
